title: ctenodon egenus
intro: Ctenodon egenus, also known as False Puebla, is a plant species native to Mexico and is part of the Boraginaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ctenodon egenus include soothing irritated skin, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be applied topically as a poultice or salve to reap its benefits.
